question: For each order, return the customer name and the dish name.
sql: SELECT customer_order.Dish_Name, customer.Name FROM customer_order LEFT JOIN customer ON customer_order.Customer_ID = customer.Customer_ID;

back_translation.intent: 获取订单和客户信息的关联数据

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求为每个订单返回客户名称和菜品名称，SQL反向翻译描述中涉及的表和列与该意图相符，且无过滤、聚合、分组或排序要求。
